2604.11424.title: Bridging What the Model Thinks and How It Speaks: Self-Aware Speech Language Models for Expressive Speech Generation
2604.11424.paper_summary: Speech Language Models (SLMs) exhibit strong semantic understanding, yet their generated speech often sounds flat and fails to convey expressive intent, undermining user engagement. We term this mismatch the semantic understanding-acoustic realization gap. We attribute this gap to two key deficiencies: (1) intent transmission failure, where SLMs fail to provide the stable utterance-level intent needed for expressive delivery; and (2) realization-unaware training, where no feedback signal verifies whether acoustic outputs faithfully reflect intended expression. To address these issues, we propose SA-SLM (Self-Aware Speech Language Model), built on the principle that the model should be aware of what it thinks during generation and how it speaks during training. SA-SLM addresses this gap through two core contributions: (1) Intent-Aware Bridging, which uses a Variational Information Bottleneck (VIB) objective to translate the model's internal semantics into temporally smooth expressive intent, making speech generation aware of what the model intends to express; and (2) Realization-Aware Alignment, which repurposes the model as its own critic to verify and align acoustic realization with intended expressive intent via rubric-based feedback. Trained on only 800 hours of expressive speech data, our 3B parameter SA-SLM surpasses all open-source baselines and comes within 0.08 points of GPT-4o-Audio in overall expressiveness on the EchoMind benchmark.
2604.11424.paper_summary_zh: 語音語言模型（SLMs）展現出強大的語意理解能力，但其生成的語音往往聽起來平淡，無法傳達表達意圖，從而削弱用戶的參與感。我們將這一不匹配稱為語意理解與聲學實現之間的差距。我們將這一差距歸因於兩個主要缺陷：（1）意圖傳遞失敗，SLMs未能提供穩定的發話層級意圖，這對於表達性傳遞至關重要；（2）實現無知訓練，沒有反饋信號來驗證聲學輸出是否忠實反映預期的表達。為了解決這些問題，我們提出了SA-SLM（自我意識語音語言模型），其建立在模型在生成過程中應該意識到自己所思考的內容以及在訓練過程中如何表達的原則上。SA-SLM通過兩個核心貢獻來解決這一差距：（1）意圖感知橋接，使用變分信息瓶頸（VIB）目標將模型的內部語意轉換為時間上平滑的表達意圖，使語音生成意識到模型希望表達的內容；（2）實現感知對齊，將模型重新用作自身的評價者，通過基於標準的反饋來驗證和對齊聲學實現與預期的表達意圖。僅用800小時的表達性語音數據進行訓練，我們的3B參數SA-SLM超越了所有開源基準，並在EchoMind基準上與GPT-4o-Audio的整體表達性相差僅0.08分。
2604.11424.author: Kuang Wang et.al.
2604.11424.authors: Kuang Wang, Lai Wei, Qibing Bai, Ping Lin, Wenkai Fang, Feng Jiang, Zhongjie Jiang, Jun Huang, Yannan Wang, Haizhou Li
